stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
A pilot is planning a long-haul flight and uses a copy of the attached annex. What can they do with the information on this chart?

options.a: Compare the mass of the aircraft with the planned cruising altitude in order to find relevant buffet boundaries.
options.b: Compare the mass of the aircraft with the bank angle to calculate maximum bank angles during the take-off flight path.
options.c: Calculate the minimum altitude that can be cruised at and still have enough fuel to reach the destination safely.
options.d: Calculate the stall speed in the landing configuration.
